description: Update the sell price of a product in Chromis POS. The application is open showing the main POS screen. You need to: (1) Navigate to the Stock/Maintenance or Product Management panel, (2) Find the product 'Jumbo Bag Red Retrospot' (currently priced at £2.47 sell price), (3) Change its sell price to £3.99, (4) Save the change. This product is the 3rd most popular item in the catalog (from real UCI Online Retail Dataset transactions with 2156 sales). After the update, the product should show the new price of £3.99 in the system.
